name: Polly Mortgage Pricing Engine API
what_it_does: Polly Mortgage Product and Pricing Engine (PPE) REST API for real-time mortgage pricing, product eligibility, and secondary market automation. Enables AI agents to manage real-time mortgage product pricing and rate sheet generation for lender pricing automation, handle borrower eligibility and product matching for loan officer automation, access investor pricing and commitment management for secondary market execution, retrieve lock and float-down pricing for rate lock automation, manage product guideline and underwriting eligibility for automated guideline matching, handle hedge strategy and pipeline risk management for capital markets automation, access competitive pricing analytics and market intelligence for pricing strategy, retrieve rate alert and pricing notification for lock desk automation, manage multi-channel pricing (retail, wholesale, correspondent) for distributor pricing automation, and integrate Polly with LOS (Encompass, Byte Pro, Calyx), POS, and secondary market systems.
use_cases: Generating real-time rate sheets from pricing agents
Matching borrowers to products from eligibility agents
Executing secondary market locks from capital markets agents
Monitoring competitor pricing from pricing strategy agents
not_for: Non-mortgage financial products without PPE requirements
Lenders without secondary market pricing complexity
Consumer-facing rate quote tools without lender backend integration
best_when: A mortgage lender, bank, or credit union wants AI agents to automate mortgage product pricing, borrower eligibility matching, rate sheet generation, secondary market execution, and capital markets hedge management.
avoid_when: TILA-RESPA INTEGRATED DISCLOSURE (TRID) RISK: Automated mortgage pricing that generates Loan Estimate disclosures must comply with TRID tolerance thresholds; automated pricing errors that generate incorrect Loan Estimates create tolerance cure obligations and CFPB examination findings. Fair lending pricing risk — automated mortgage pricing algorithms must be tested for disparate impact on protected classes (race, national origin, sex); automated pricing that results in differential pricing for comparable borrowers creates ECOA and FHA fair lending liability. Secondary market investor eligibility — automated best execution and investor selection must comply with investor eligibility guidelines and geographic restrictions; automated loan delivery to ineligible investors creates put-back risk.

auth.notes: Polly uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2019. Private (Menlo Ventures, 8VC, Kleiner Perkins). Cloud-native mortgage PPE competing with legacy Optimal Blue. 200+ lender customers. API-first mortgage pricing platform. Competes with Optimal Blue, MeridianLink, and Black Knight for mortgage product and pricing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-lender or per-channel pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Founded 2019. Menlo/8VC/Kleiner-backed. 200+ lender customers. Cloud-native mortgage PPE. Competes with Optimal Blue and Black Knight PPE.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; pricing engine has SLA for rate sheet delivery

known_agent_gotchas: TRID LOAN ESTIMATE ACCURACY: Automated mortgage pricing generating Loan Estimate disclosures must comply with TRID tolerance thresholds; automated pricing errors in disclosed fees create tolerance cure obligations and CFPB examination risk

Fair lending disparate pricing — automated mortgage pricing algorithms must be tested for disparate impact on race, national origin, and other protected classes; automated pricing that creates differential pricing for comparable borrowers creates ECOA and FHA violation

Secondary market investor eligibility validation — automated best execution must validate investor geographic restrictions, loan size limits, and product eligibility; delivery to ineligible investors creates put-back (repurchase) demand risk

Rate lock automation timing risk — automated rate lock execution must account for investor lock desk hours and lock request deadlines; automated locks submitted after cut-off create pricing slippage and pair-off fees

Market hours and pricing availability — mortgage pricing is dependent on bond market trading hours; automated pricing outside MBS market hours returns stale or unavailable rates; implement market hours awareness

GSE guideline changes — Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac underwriting guideline updates affect product eligibility; automated eligibility matching must account for guideline effective dates and lender overlays
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mortgage pricing. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Mortgage pricing and borrower data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mortgage pricing. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Mortgage pricing and loan data.
